# StartupJS

> Full-stack framework for real-time cross-platform apps built on Expo, React Native, reactive signals, Teamplay ORM, and StartupJS UI primitives.

## Core Docs

- [StartupJS README](./README.md): Framework overview, quickstart, installation, upgrading, and development entry points.
- [StartupJS Documentation Home](./docs/index.md): Documentation landing page that introduces the framework and links into core learning paths.

## Tutorial

- [Quickstart](./docs/tutorial/foundation.mdx): Foundation tutorial for getting started with StartupJS concepts and project setup.
- [Build a TODO app](./docs/tutorial/basics.mdx): Core tutorial covering everyday StartupJS development patterns.
- [Pug](./docs/tutorial/pug.mdx): Guide to Pug templating in StartupJS.
- [Observer pattern](./docs/tutorial/observer.mdx): Guide to observer-based reactivity and component updates.
- [Signals API](./docs/tutorial/racerModel.mdx): Guide to working with reactive data models and signals.
- [Project structure](./docs/tutorial/fileStructure.mdx): A StartupJS project is built on top of Expo, so the folder layout follows standard Expo Router conventions. This chapter explains the key folders and files.
- [Signals and subscriptions](./docs/tutorial/sharedbHooks.mdx): This chapter covers the core tools for working with data in StartupJS: the root signal $, subscriptions with useSub, and local signals with $().
- [Stylus](./docs/tutorial/stylus.mdx): Stylus is a CSS preprocessor that StartupJS uses by default. It drops the braces, colons, and semicolons of regular CSS and uses indentation instead.
- [Tricks with styles](./docs/tutorial/tricksWithStyles.mdx): This chapter covers useful style conventions, built-in mixins, and global design tokens available in StartupJS.

## Foundations

- [Security](./docs/foundations/security.mdx): Access control, document security, and production safety requirements.
- [WebSocket](./docs/foundations/websocket.mdx): Custom WebSocket integration on top of the StartupJS server.
- [Border radius](./docs/foundations/borderRadius.mdx): Consistent border radius values help the UI feel cohesive. Use the three tokens below unless you have a strong reason to introduce a custom value.
- [Collection types](./docs/foundations/collectionTypes.mdx): StartupJS organizes data into collections. There are two kinds: **public** and **private**.
- [Color customization](./docs/foundations/colorCustomization.mdx): StartupJS separates **palette colors** (raw swatches) from **semantic colors** (named roles like bg-main or text-main). You can customize either layer depending on how much control you need.
- [Colors](./docs/foundations/colors.mdx): StartupJS uses **semantic color names** to keep UI consistent. Instead of hardcoding hex values, use named tokens like bg-main or text-error. This makes it easy to change a theme later without editing every component.
- [E2E testing](./docs/foundations/e2e-tests.mdx): StartupJS uses **Playwright** for end-to-end tests. The CLI provides helpers to generate and run tests with the app already running.
- [Editing patterns](./docs/foundations/editing.mdx): StartupJS is reactive by default: when you update a document, every subscribed client sees the change immediately. That is great for collaboration, but sometimes you want a local draft that only saves on demand.
- [Export CSS to JS](./docs/foundations/exportCSStoJS.mdx): StartupJS lets you export values from Stylus files directly into JavaScript using the :export block. This is handy for sharing theme values or layout constants.
- [Caching node_modules](./docs/foundations/nodeModulesCache.mdx): If your CI or offline workflow benefits from caching dependencies, you can keep the Yarn cache inside your project and commit it.

## General

- ['Models' hook](./docs/general/models.md): Overview of model organization and framework data patterns.
- [Hooks](./docs/general/hooks.md): Guide to StartupJS hooks and extension points.
- [Plugins in Startupjs](./docs/general/plugins.md): Plugin system overview and extension model.
- [How to create your own plugin](./docs/general/create-plugin.md): How to create a plugin for StartupJS.
- [Modules in Startupjs](./docs/general/about-modules.md): Explanation of modules, plugins, and how extensibility is structured.
- [Experimental Hooks](./docs/general/experimental-hooks.md): The 'logs' hook handles requests for getting and saving logs.

## Libraries

- [Startupjs Router](./docs/libraries/startupjs-router.mdx): Documentation for StartupJS router usage and routing patterns.
- [Startupjs Worker](./docs/libraries/startupjs-worker.mdx): Documentation for background jobs and worker integration.

## Library Packages

- [2fa-manager](./libraries/2fa-manager/docs/2fa-manager.en.mdx): Component for using various two-factor authentication methods.
- [@startupjs/2fa-push-notification-provider](./libraries/2fa-push-notification-provider/docs/push-notifications.en.mdx): Provider for verification via @startupjs/push-notification.
- [@startupjs/2fa-totp-authentication-provider](./libraries/2fa-totp-authentication-provider/docs/2fa-totp-authentication-provider.en.mdx): Provider for verification via google authenticator app.
- [2fa-totp-authentication](./libraries/2fa-totp-authentication/docs/2fa-totp-authentication.en.mdx): @startupjs/auth
- [2fa](./libraries/2fa/docs/2fa.en.mdx): @startupjs/auth
- [Apple Authorization](./libraries/auth-apple/docs/readme.en.mdx): Configuring main module
- [Azure AD](./libraries/auth-azuread/docs/readme.en.mdx): Configuring main module
- [Common](./libraries/auth-common/docs/readme.en.mdx): Configuring main module
- [Authorization via Facebook](./libraries/auth-facebook/docs/readme.en.mdx): Configuring main module
- [Authorization via Google](./libraries/auth-google/docs/readme.en.mdx): Configuring main module
- [Авторизация через iDecisionGames](./libraries/auth-idg/readme.md): Настройка главного модуля
- [Authorization via Linkedin](./libraries/auth-linkedin/docs/readme.en.mdx): Configuring main module
- [Local auth](./libraries/auth-local/docs/readme.en.mdx): LoginForm, RecoverForm, RegisterForm, ChangePasswordForm } from '@startupjs/auth-local'
- [Авторизация через LTI](./libraries/auth-lti/readme.md): Настройка главного модуля
- [Authorization via Telegram](./libraries/auth-telegram/docs/readme.en.md): Configuring main module
- [Authorization](./libraries/auth/docs/readme.en.mdx): In the body of the **startup js Server** function, the module is initialized, and strategies are added to **strategies**, each with its own set of characteristics:
- [@startupjs/babel-plugin-import-to-react-lazy](./libraries/babel-plugin-import-to-react-lazy/README.md): Transforms exported default import to React.lazy dynamic import.
- [@startupjs/babel-plugin-ts-interface-to-json-schema](./libraries/babel-plugin-ts-interface-to-json-schema/README.md): Transforms typescript interface to JSON-schema and add schema as static field to ORM model.
- [startupjs cron](./libraries/cron/README.md): Create cron.js file in the root of your project. Perform all initialization here (plug in hooks, ORM, etc.) and then run your cron tasks.
- [i18n](./libraries/i18n/readme/readme.en.mdx): i18n module provides with tools to localize your product.
- [Mail service](./libraries/mailgun/readme/readme.en.mdx): Library to send email messages in app via mailgun
- [Push Notifications](./libraries/push-notifications/docs/push-notifications.en.mdx): !IMPORTANT! The package only works on ios and android platforms!
- [@startupjs/recaptcha](./libraries/recaptcha/readme/readme.en.mdx): library for displaying and interacting with Google ReCaptcha
- [Scrollable anchors](./libraries/scrollable-anchors/readme/readme.en.mdx): Component for native anchors imitation and animating vertical scrolling.
- [@startupjs/serve-static-promo](./libraries/serve-static-promo/readme/readme.en.mdx): This package is used to serve static promo page from the .zip file inside /promo folder in the root of your project.

## PM Guidelines

- [@startupjs/pm README](./libraries/pm/README.md): Project management automation package overview and entry point to its supporting guidelines.
- [@startupjs/pm Guidelines](./libraries/pm/guidelines.md): Core project management guidelines for the pm package.
- [@startupjs/pm Developers Guide](./libraries/pm/guidelines_en/developers.md): 1. Just create a new Issue on GitHub. 2. After creation, it will automatically receive the 👽 New status. 3. You'll see this new task in 👽 New column in Project's 📅 𝙿𝙻𝙰𝙽𝙽𝙸𝙽𝙶 tab. 4. If your Team Lead or Project Manager asked to work on it this sprint (this or next week), then assign it to yourself and change its status to ᴅᴇᴠ: 🎁 Todo. Do it AFTER you have created the task itself - you will not be able to set status until you have actually created the task first.
- [@startupjs/pm Designers Guide](./libraries/pm/guidelines_en/designers.md): 1. Just create a new Issue on GitHub. 2. After creation, it will automatically receive the 👽 New status. 3. You'll see this new task in 👽 New column in Project's 📅 𝙿𝙻𝙰𝙽𝙽𝙸𝙽𝙶 tab. 4. If your Team Lead or Project Manager asked to work on it this sprint (this or next week), then assign it to yourself and change its status to ᴜx: 🎴 Todo. Do it AFTER you have created the task itself - you will not be able to set status until you have actually created the task first.
- [@startupjs/pm QA Guide](./libraries/pm/guidelines_en/qa.md): - either move it further to ✅ Ready for Prod, or return it back to ❤️ Changes requested and write in the task comments what needs to be changed.
- [@startupjs/pm Team Leads Guide](./libraries/pm/guidelines_en/teamLeads.md): 1. Just create a new Issue on GitHub. 2. After creation, it will automatically receive the 👽 New status. 3. You'll see this new task in 👽 New column in Project's 📅 𝙿𝙻𝙰𝙽𝙽𝙸𝙽𝙶 tab.

## Migration Guides

- [Upgrade 0.22 to 0.23](./docs/migration-guides/0.23.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.23.
- [Upgrade 0.23 to 0.24](./docs/migration-guides/0.24.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.24.
- [Upgrade 0.24 to 0.25](./docs/migration-guides/0.25.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.25.
- [Upgrade 0.25 to 0.26](./docs/migration-guides/0.26.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.26.
- [Upgrade 0.26 to 0.27](./docs/migration-guides/0.27.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.27.
- [Upgrade 0.27 to 0.28](./docs/migration-guides/0.28.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.28.
- [Upgrade 0.28 to 0.29](./docs/migration-guides/0.29.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.29.
- [Upgrade 0.29 to 0.30](./docs/migration-guides/0.30.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.30.
- [Upgrade 0.30 to 0.31](./docs/migration-guides/0.31.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.31.
- [Upgrade 0.31 to 0.32](./docs/migration-guides/0.32.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.32.
- [Upgrade 0.32 to 0.33](./docs/migration-guides/0.33.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.33.
- [Upgrade 0.33 to 0.34](./docs/migration-guides/0.34.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.34.
- [Upgrade 0.34 to 0.35](./docs/migration-guides/0.35.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.35.
- [Upgrade 0.35 to 0.36](./docs/migration-guides/0.36.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.36.
- [Upgrade 0.36 to 0.37](./docs/migration-guides/0.37.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.37.
- [Upgrade 0.37 to 0.38](./docs/migration-guides/0.38.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.38.
- [Upgrade 0.38 to 0.39](./docs/migration-guides/0.39.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.39.
- [Upgrade 0.39 to 0.40](./docs/migration-guides/0.40.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.40.
- [Upgrade 0.40 to 0.41](./docs/migration-guides/0.41.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.41.
- [Upgrade 0.41 to 0.42](./docs/migration-guides/0.42.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.42.
- [Upgrade 0.42 to 0.43](./docs/migration-guides/0.43.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.43.
- [Upgrade 0.43 to 0.44](./docs/migration-guides/0.44.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.44.
- [Upgrade 0.44 to 0.45](./docs/migration-guides/0.45.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.45.
- [Upgrade 0.45 to 0.46](./docs/migration-guides/0.46.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.46.
- [Upgrade 0.46 to 0.47](./docs/migration-guides/0.47.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.47.
- [Upgrade 0.47 to 0.48](./docs/migration-guides/0.48.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.48.
- [Upgrade 0.48 to 0.49](./docs/migration-guides/0.49.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.48.
- [Upgrade 0.49 to 0.50](./docs/migration-guides/0.50.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.50.
- [Upgrade 0.50 to 0.51](./docs/migration-guides/0.51.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.51.
- [Upgrade 0.51 to 0.52](./docs/migration-guides/0.52.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.52.
- [Upgrade 0.52 to 0.53](./docs/migration-guides/0.53.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.53.
- [Upgrade 0.53 to 0.54](./docs/migration-guides/0.54.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.54.
- [Upgrade 0.54 to 0.55](./docs/migration-guides/0.55.md): Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.55
- [Upgrade 0.60 to 0.61](./docs/migration-guides/0.61.md): - Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.61 - Switch from using @startupjs/ui to startupjs-ui version ^0.1.6
- [Upgrade 0.61 to 0.62](./docs/migration-guides/0.62.md): - Change startupjs and all @startupjs/* dependencies in your package.json to ^0.62 - Run yarn after the version bump
